text:
Once upon a time, in a quaint village far from the roar of city life, there lived an elderly woman named Mrs. Willow. Known for her lush garden and wise eyes, she had a garden gnome named Glimmer.

Glimmer was small and shiny, always waving at passersby. One sunny afternoon, as Mrs. Willow was weeding her immaculate flower beds, Glimmer darted towards a patch of vibrant blue blooms.

Curiosity piqued, Mrs. Willow gave chase.

"You’re up to no good!" she called, chasing her gnome.

Glimmer giggled from behind a flower.

"You're making it too easy," he confessed.

Eventually, Mrs. Willow stopped. "Where do you think you're going?"

Glimmer pointed to the sky. "I'm going to fly!"

Mrs. Willow laughed. "You and whose angel?"

A gentle wind began to swirl around Glimmer. "Just let me try something," he whispered earnest
